name: Cherry-Pecan Miniature Corn Muffins
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces (1 stick) butter, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Spray miniature muffin pans with nonstick cooking spray.
3. In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, cornmeal, sugar, baking powder, salt, pecans, and cherries. Set aside.
4. In a small bowl, thoroughly combine the buttermilk and eggs.
5. Pour the buttermilk mixture and melted butter into the flour mixture. Stir with a wooden spoon until combined.
6. Fill the muffin tins with batter to the rim of each cup.
7. Bake in the preheated oven for 20 to 22 minutes, or until the tops are lightly browned.
